ideation: This sequence will show the beaver working diligently, using its front paws.  The animation will focus on the left arm mimicking the action of holding and manipulating something, while the right arm remains in a supporting position. Frame 1 will show both arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 will show the left arm raised slightly and angled forward, as if holding an object. Frame 3 will show the left arm moving downward, as if putting the object down. Frame 4 will show the right arm moving forward slightly, as if to steady itself. Frame 5 will show the beaver returning to its neutral position, ready for the next action.

frames.beat: both arms hang loosely, ready to work
left arm lifts, holding something unseen
left arm lowers the object, right arm steadies
right arm moves forward, bracing for impact
both arms return to a resting state
